title: isodon bulleyanus var. foliosus
intro: Isodon bulleyanus var. foliosus, also known as the Chinese isodon, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Isodon bulleyanus var. foliosus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
